      (Hymenoptera: Braconidae).
PG  - 1303-1311
LID - 10.1093/jee/toaf356 [doi]
AB  - The novel meta-diamide insecticide cyproflanilide is highly effective on the rice 
      stem borer, Chilo suppressalis (Lepidoptera: Pyralidae). Nevertheless, the 
      sublethal effects on key natural enemies, such as Cotesia chilonis (Hymenoptera: 
      Braconidae), remain unexplored
